title: origanum scabrum
intro: Origanum scabrum, also known as prickly thyme, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, pinkish-purple flowers and thorny stems. Traditionally, Origanum scabrum has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Origanum scabrum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Origanum scabrum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
